FARNBOROUGH AIRPORT IS EQUIPPED WITH AN ADS-B SURFACE SURVEILLANCE SYSTEM (UNDER TRIAL). 1/ FLIGHT CREW SHOULD SELECT XPDR, OR EQUIVALENT, AUTO IF AVAILABLE, AND THE ASSIGNED CODE: A/ FROM THE REQUEST TO PUSH BACK OR TAXI, WHICHEVER IS EARLIER. B/ AFTER LANDING, CONTINUOUSLY UNTIL THE AIRCRAFT IS PARKED ON STAND. AFTER PARKING THE MODE A CODE 2000 MUST BE SET BEFORE SELECTING OFF OR STDBY. 2/ FLIGHT CREW OF AIRCRAFT EQUIPPED WITH MODE S HAVING AN AIRCRAFT IDENTIFICATION FEATURE SHOULD ALSO SET THE AIRCRAFT IDENTIFICATION. THIS SETTING IS THE AIRCRAFT IDENTIFICATION SPECIFIED IN ITEM 7 OF THE ICAO ATC FLIGHT PLAN. THE AIRCRAFT IDENTIFICATION SHOULD BE ENTERED FROM THE REQUEST FOR PUSH BACK OR TAXI, WHICHEVER IS EARLIER, THROUGH THE FMS OR THE TRANSPONDER CONTROL PANEL. NOTAM WILL BE SUPERSEDED BY AIP SUP WEF 28 MAY 2026.
